SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Interface HeaderConfig

public interface HeaderConfig
This interface contains all Atmosphere headers shared between the client and the server.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    ACCESS_CONTROL_ALLOW_CREDENTIALS
     
    static final String
    ACCESS_CONTROL_ALLOW_ORIGIN

    X_ATMO_WEBSOCKET_PROXY
     
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE
     
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_ACK
    Server acknowledgment of a received message.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH
    Header carrying the authentication token.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH_EXPIRED
    Header sent by the server to indicate the token has expired and no refresh was possible.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH_REFRESH
    Header sent by the server when a refreshed token is available.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_ERROR
    When a unexpected error occurs.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_FIRSTLONGPOLLING_DONE
    If long-polling is used during a POST, this header is added after the first successful response.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_FRAMEWORK
    The current version of Atmosphere Framework.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_MESSAGE_ID
    Client-assigned message ID for acknowledgment tracking.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_TRACKING_ID
    The unique tracking ID generated by the server.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_TRACKMESSAGESIZE
    The message size sent by Atmosphere.
    static final String
    X_ATMOSPHERE_TRANSPORT
    The current transport used.
    static final String
    X_FIRST_REQUEST
     
    static final String
    X_HEARTBEAT_SERVER
    The desired heartbeat interval in seconds sent by the server and asked by the client.

  • Field Details

    • X_ATMOSPHERE_FIRSTLONGPOLLING_DONE

      static final String X_ATMOSPHERE_FIRSTLONGPOLLING_DONE
      If long-polling is used during a POST, this header is added after the first successful response.
      See Also:

    • FORCE_BINARY

      static final String FORCE_BINARY
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH

      static final String X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH
      Header carrying the authentication token. Used by long-polling (fetch) requests which can set custom headers. WebSocket and SSE use the query parameter instead.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH_REFRESH

      static final String X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH_REFRESH
      Header sent by the server when a refreshed token is available. The client should store this and use it for subsequent requests.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH_EXPIRED

      static final String X_ATMOSPHERE_AUTH_EXPIRED
      Header sent by the server to indicate the token has expired and no refresh was possible. The client should re-authenticate.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • X_ATMOSPHERE_MESSAGE_ID

      static final String X_ATMOSPHERE_MESSAGE_ID
      Client-assigned message ID for acknowledgment tracking. Sent by the client; echoed back in X_ATMOSPHERE_ACK.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • X_ATMOSPHERE_ACK

      static final String X_ATMOSPHERE_ACK
      Server acknowledgment of a received message. Contains the message ID.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
